mapper.insert:
SELECT "seq_comment_no".NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO "comment" ("comment_no", "board_no", "comment_content", "writer", "created_dt", "delete_flag") VALUES (#{commentNo}, #{boardNo}, #{commentContent}, #{writer}, SYSDATE, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT "comment_no" AS commentNo, "board_no" AS boardNo, "comment_content" AS commentContent, u."name", c."created_dt" AS createdDt, c."delete_flag" AS deleteFlag FROM "comment" c JOIN "user" u ON c."writer" = u."user_no" WHERE c."comment_no" = #{commentNo} AND c."delete_flag" = 0

SELECT "comment_no" AS commentNo, "board_no" AS boardNo, "comment_content" AS commentContent, u."name", c."created_dt" AS createdDt, c."delete_flag" AS deleteFlag FROM "comment" c JOIN "user" u ON c."writer" = u."user_no" WHERE c."board_no" = #{boardNo} AND c."delete_flag" = 0 ORDER BY c."comment_no" ASC
